notes: The source CSV does not contain column headers.
The favorable rate of 26.84 percent is mathematically consistent with 775 favorable records out of 2888 evaluated records.
The overdue open amount rate of 81.14 percent is mathematically consistent with overdue open amount divided by total open amount.

The exact business definitions of evaluatedRecordCount, favorableRecordCount, unfavorableRecordCount, secondaryPerformanceRate, and severelyOverdueOpenAmount should be confirmed against the source SQL.
The provisional labels preserve the apparent supplier-performance meaning without asserting unsupported SAP field definitions.
